# link11waap_load_balancer_regions (Data Source)

Retrieves load balancer region configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example: Load Balancer Regions Data Source

data "link11waap_config" "main" {}

data "link11waap_load_balancer_regions" "all" {
  config_id = data.link11waap_config.main.id
}

output "city_codes" {
  value = data.link11waap_load_balancer_regions.all.city_codes
}

output "load_balancer_regions" {
  value = [for lb in data.link11waap_load_balancer_regions.all.lbs : {
    id      = lb.id
    name    = lb.name
    regions = lb.regions
  }]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config_id` (String) Configuration ID.

### Read-Only

- `city_codes` (Map of String) Map of city codes to names.
- `lbs` (Attributes List) List of load balancer region configurations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--lbs))

<a id="nestedatt--lbs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `lbs`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `regions` (Map of String)
- `upstream_regions` (List of String)
